It's currently ~7pm, so you're past dinner and heading toward your evening routine at 9:30. Looks like a well-structured day, Jm — rehab block at 10:30 is good to see given C3 goals.

🗣️ Kaya: Seventeen events today. You're past dinner now, evening routine at nine-thirty remains.

params.command: pai-cli gcal today 2>/dev/null || pai-cli calendar today 2>/dev/null || echo "CALENDAR_CLI_UNAVAILABLE"
params.description: Check today's calendar events via CLI

tool_calls.name: Bash
tool_calls.result:
~/.claude/bin/pai-cli
\033[0;36mpai-cli\033[0m - Unified CLI wrapper for PAI Unix tools

\033[0;34mUsage:\033[0m
  pai-cli <service> [options]

\033[0;34mAvailable Services:\033[0m
  \033[0;32myoutube, yt\033[0m        YouTube video operations (via yt-dlp)
  \033[0;32mcalendar, gcal\033[0m     Google Calendar operations (via gcalcli)
  \033[0;32mdrive\033[0m              Google Drive operations (via rclone)
  \033[0;32mgmail\033[0m              Gmail operations (via gog)
  \033[0;32mgemini, ai\033[0m         Gemini AI operations (via gemini-cli)
  \033[0;32msheets\033[0m             Google Sheets operations
  \033[0;32mplaces\033[0m             Google Places discovery
  \033[0;32masana\033[0m              Asana task management (full CRUD)
  \033[0;32mplaywright, pw\033[0m     Browser automation (via Browse.ts)
  \033[0;32mbrowser\033[0m            Browser automation (alias for playwright)
  \033[0;32mbluesky, bsky\033[0m      Bluesky social operations (via bsky)
  \033[0;32mweather\033[0m            Weather information (via wttr.in)
  \033[0;32mlinear\033[0m             Linear issue tracking (via linearis)
  \033[0;32mslack\033[0m              Slack messaging (via slackcat)

tool_calls.name: Bash

params.description: Get today's calendar events with full error output

tool_calls.error:
Exit code 2
usage: gcalcli [-h] [--version] [--client-id CLIENT_ID]
               [--client-secret CLIENT_SECRET] [--noauth_local_server]
               [--config-folder CONFIG_FOLDER] [--noincluderc]
               [--calendar GLOBAL_CALENDARS]
               [--default-calendar DEFAULT_CALENDARS] [--locale LOCALE]
               [--refresh] [--nocache] [--conky] [--nocolor]
               [--lineart {fancy,unicode,ascii}]
               {init,list,search,edit,delete,agenda,agendaupdate,updates,conflicts,calw,calm,quick,add,import,remind,config,util} ...
gcalcli: error: argument command: invalid choice: 'today' (choose from init, list, search, edit, delete, agenda, agendaupdate, updates, conflicts, calw, calm, quick, add, import, remind, config, util)
